Lorea & Amy's Recipes
  • List

Sandwich Bread

Yield 1 loaf
Preparation time 3.5h
Cook time 35m
Ingredients
  • 3.5g active dry yeast
  • 1-1/8 cups warm water (110° to 115°)
  • 1 1/2 tbsp sugar plus 1/4 tsp sugar
  • 1/2 tbsp salt
  • 1 tablespoon vegetable oil
  • ~375g bread flour
Instructions
  1. Whisk together 1 1/2 tablespoons sugar, 1/2 tbsp salt, and 188g flour.
  2. In a large bowl, dissolve yeast and 1/4 teaspoon sugar in warm water, let stand until bubbles form on surface.
  3. Stir 1 tbsp oil into yeast mixture
  4. Pour yeast mixture into flour mixture and beat until smooth.
  5. Stir in enough remaining flour, 63g at a time, to form a soft dough.
  6. Turn onto a floured surface; knead until smooth and elastic, 8-10 minutes.
  7. Place in a greased bowl, turning once to grease the top.
  8. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled, 1-1/2 to 2 hours.
  9. Punch dough down.
  10. Turn onto a lightly floured surface.
  11. Shape into a loaf.
  12. Place in a greased 9x5-inch loaf pan.
  13. Cover and let rise until doubled, 1 to 1-1/2 hours.
  14. Bake at 375° until golden brown and bread sounds hollow when tapped or has reached an internal temperature of 200°, 30-35 minutes. Remove from pan to wire racks to cool.
